prompt_summary: Based on the storyboard text of a rainy night reunion at a hospital entrance, generating 2 cinematic realistic image prompts for AI generation, focusing on character consistency, cold lighting, rainy atmosphere, and dramatic tension.

items.source_visual_description: Lin Wan holding a black umbrella standing on hospital entrance steps, rainy night, wet ground.
items.positive_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, young woman holding a black umbrella standing on hospital entrance steps at night, heavy rain falling, wet pavement reflecting cold blue-gray light, medium shot, eye-level angle, detailed facial expression showing tension, realistic clothing, dramatic contrast lighting, atmospheric depth
items.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, distorted face, watermark, text, logo, overexposed, underexposed, duplicate people
items.camera_language: Medium shot, eye-level angle, with rain as foreground element, focusing on the character on steps, slight low angle to emphasize height.
items.lighting: Cold ambient lighting from rainy night environment, with possible street lamps or hospital lights creating blue-gray tones, wet surfaces reflecting light to enhance mood.
items.color_palette: Dominant blue-gray and dark tones, with highlights from rain droplets and subtle warm accents from distant lights or reflections.
items.character_consistency: Lin Wan with black umbrella, wearing a coat or appropriate rainy night attire, consistent age in mid-20s, restrained expression, maintaining appearance across shots.
items.environment: Hospital entrance at night, rainy weather, concrete steps, glass doors, wet pavement, possibly parked cars or ambient urban elements in background.
items.composition: Vertical composition, character centered on steps, rain streaks adding depth and texture, foreground wet ground with reflections, background slightly blurred for focus.
items.model_hint: General image model, prioritize realistic cinematic details, clean human anatomy, and atmospheric rain effects.
items.notes: Ensure the rainy night setting and cold lighting are prominent. No additional characters or changes to the hospital entrance scene.

items.source_visual_description: Gu Chen stepping out of a black sedan, two characters staring at each other through rain and car headlights.
items.positive_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, young man stepping out of a black sedan in heavy rain, two characters making eye contact through raindrops and cold white car headlights, medium shot, eye-level angle, dramatic tension, realistic details, blue-gray lighting with headlight highlights, wet pavement reflections
items.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, distorted face, watermark, text, logo, overexposed, underexposed, duplicate people
items.camera_language: Medium shot, eye-level angle, capturing both characters in frame with car and rain, slight over-the-shoulder perspective to emphasize confrontation.
items.lighting: Cold ambient lighting from rainy night, with car headlights providing strong white light creating contrast and shadows, wet surfaces enhancing reflections for mood.
items.color_palette: Blue-gray dominant with white headlight accents, dark tones from car and rain, subtle warm hints from tail lights or background elements.
items.character_consistency: Gu Chen in dark coat or formal attire, consistent age in mid-20s, determined expression; Lin Wan with black umbrella, same appearance as previous shot, both maintaining continuity in clothing and features.
items.environment: Hospital entrance at night, rainy weather, black sedan parked, wet pavement, car headlights illuminating rain, background with hospital facade or urban elements.
items.composition: Vertical composition, two characters positioned on either side of the frame, car and rain forming visual separation, headlight beams adding depth and focus on faces.
items.model_hint: General image model, focus on realistic details, clean anatomy, dynamic lighting from car headlights, and atmospheric rain effects.
items.notes: Maintain character consistency with previous shot, emphasizing the rainy night reunion and cold lighting. No new characters or plot elements added.
